description: Deutsche Welle Persian is the Persian-language service of Deutsche Welle, Germany's international public broadcaster. Operating since 1962, DW Persian provides radio, television, and digital content funded by the German federal government. Like other international Persian-language outlets, DW Persian staff and their families in Iran have faced harassment by Iranian authorities, and the regime has banned DW correspondents from operating inside the country.
editorial_notes: German publicly funded broadcaster. Persian service since 1962.
